description: Permission bitmask with FINANCIAL_MEDIUM (bit 3) set but FINANCIAL_SMALL (bit 2) unset. This violates the cumulative-bit encoding rule and must be rejected by validateCumulativeBitEncoding().

input_witnesses.explanation: bit 3 (FINANCIAL_MEDIUM) is set, bit 2 (FINANCIAL_SMALL) is unset — violates implication rule

failure_reason: FINANCIAL_MEDIUM (bit 3) requires FINANCIAL_SMALL (bit 2) to be set — validateCumulativeBitEncoding returns false
